TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Blake Ahearn sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1984, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 5, Blake Ahearn, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya(qyanux nya ) Blake Ahearn mqwas biru maki Immacolata St. Louis laqii pqwasan cikuy. hiya ga mzyu mari cyugal kawas maki pqwasan biru. kawas tay 2003-2007 maki Missouri hopa pqwasan biru praw squliq na p'unro. yalaw gi rnagaI qilis ruw. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: βlake aħearn s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βlake aħearn, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja(qjanux nja ) βlake aħearn mqwas~ɕ βiru maki immaʦ~ʨolata s~ɕt. louis~ɕ laqii pqwas~ɕan ʦ~ʨikuj. ħija ɣa mzju mari ʦ~ʨjuɣal kawas~ɕ maki pqwas~ɕan βiru. kawas~ɕ taj ****-**** maki mis~ɕs~ɕouri ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru praw s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. jalaw ɣi rnaɣai qilis~ɕ ruw. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Blake Ahearn sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1984, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 5, Blake Ahearn, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya(qyanux nya ) Blake Ahearn mqwas biru maki Immacolata St. Louis laqii pqwasan cikuy. hiya ga mzyu mari cyugal kawas maki pqwasan biru. kawas tay 2003-2007 maki Missouri hopa pqwasan biru praw squliq na p'unro. yalaw gi rnagaI qilis ruw. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: βlake aħearn s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βlake aħearn, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja(qjanux nja ) βlake aħearn mqwas~ɕ βiru maki immaʦ~ʨolata s~ɕt. louis~ɕ laqii pqwas~ɕan ʦ~ʨikuj. ħija ɣa mzju mari ʦ~ʨjuɣal kawas~ɕ maki pqwas~ɕan βiru. kawas~ɕ taj ****-**** maki mis~ɕs~ɕouri ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru praw s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. jalaw ɣi rnaɣai qilis~ɕ ruw. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
